creator: dcs@newsguy.com
text:
n_hibma@FreeBSD.ORG wrote:
> 
> cd /sys/i386/conf
> config -gr GENERIC
> cd ../../compile/GENERIC
> make
> make install

I thought the target "all" was required in the procedure.

	"Well, Windows works, using a loose definition of 'works'..."
